title: Three-year-old on family trip dies after parked tempo traveller rolls forward in TVM
summary: A three-year-old girl died after a tempo traveller rolled over her during a family outing in Thiruvananthapuram. The vehicle, with its handbrake reportedly not fully engaged, moved while the father was inside.

title: TVM woman held in gold misappropriation case after two loan company staffers' suicide bid
summary: A woman was arrested for defrauding two gold loan employees of seventy sovereigns of gold. Their subsequent suicide attempt resulted in one death and one critical condition.

summary: Kerala's Chief Minister's Distress Relief Fund granted ₹40 lakh for four families' rehabilitation, following a boy's death from an illegally electrified wire. They will relocate from a disaster-prone area.

title: Man held for robbery attempt at judge's residence in Wayanad
summary: A 32-year-old man was arrested for an attempted burglary at a senior judge's residence. He attempted to force entry after disabling CCTV cameras but fled when disturbed.

title: Man killed in assault during property dispute in Malappuram; younger brother in custody
summary: A fatal property dispute occurred in Malappuram where a man died after an alleged assault by his brother, who is now in police custody.

title: സ്വർണ വില 2 ലക്ഷം പോയിട്ട്, 1.2 ലക്ഷം പോലും ആകില്ല: വൻ പ്രതീക്ഷ നൽകി പ്രവചനം

title: ഇ20 പെട്രോള്‍ വേണ്ടെന്ന് ഇന്ത്യയോട് ഭൂട്ടാന്‍; 'സാധാരണ പെട്രോള്‍ തന്നെ വിതരണം ചെയ്താല്‍ മതി'
